## Meeting Purpose

[Catch up and discuss AI implementation challenges in Vivian's work at Mae.](https://fathom.video/share/sbMExzD8ksniwWaMp1tbwpxTNqnaoTp_?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Vivian is struggling with structuring and refining AI prompts for vehicle recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/sbMExzD8ksniwWaMp1tbwpxTNqnaoTp_?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [George shared insights on GrowthX's AI workflow process, emphasizing a step-by-step approach](https://fathom.video/share/sbMExzD8ksniwWaMp1tbwpxTNqnaoTp_?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Vivian plans to break down her process into more granular steps and possibly consult with Daniel (GrowthX CTO) for expert guidance](https://fathom.video/share/sbMExzD8ksniwWaMp1tbwpxTNqnaoTp_?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Topics

### Mae's AI-Powered Vehicle Recommendation System

  - [Vivian implementing wearable devices in dealerships to capture customer conversations](https://fathom.video/share/sbMExzD8ksniwWaMp1tbwpxTNqnaoTp_?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [System analyzes transcripts, customer profiles, and inventory to recommend vehicles](https://fathom.video/share/sbMExzD8ksniwWaMp1tbwpxTNqnaoTp_?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Challenges in prompt engineering and result validation](https://fathom.video/share/sbMExzD8ksniwWaMp1tbwpxTNqnaoTp_?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Current process:](https://fathom.video/share/sbMExzD8ksniwWaMp1tbwpxTNqnaoTp_?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
    1.  Gather input (transcript, guest sheet, inventory)
    2.  Generate customer summary with AI insights
    3.  Use large prompt to generate 5 vehicle recommendation scenarios
    4.  Manually review and iterate on results

### GrowthX's AI Workflow Process

  - [Utilizes a step-by-step approach with individual prompts for each stage](https://fathom.video/share/sbMExzD8ksniwWaMp1tbwpxTNqnaoTp_?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Implements confidence scoring and self-evaluation loops](https://fathom.video/share/sbMExzD8ksniwWaMp1tbwpxTNqnaoTp_?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Uses various AI models (Claude, ChatGPT, Perplexity) for different tasks](https://fathom.video/share/sbMExzD8ksniwWaMp1tbwpxTNqnaoTp_?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Emphasizes the importance of breaking down complex tasks into smaller, manageable steps](https://fathom.video/share/sbMExzD8ksniwWaMp1tbwpxTNqnaoTp_?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

### AI Tools and Best Practices

  - [George recommends using Claude for document understanding and writing tasks](https://fathom.video/share/sbMExzD8ksniwWaMp1tbwpxTNqnaoTp_?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [ChatGPT useful for structuring information and creating tables](https://fathom.video/share/sbMExzD8ksniwWaMp1tbwpxTNqnaoTp_?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Perplexity AI suggested for research tasks](https://fathom.video/share/sbMExzD8ksniwWaMp1tbwpxTNqnaoTp_?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Importance of providing context and examples in prompts](https://fathom.video/share/sbMExzD8ksniwWaMp1tbwpxTNqnaoTp_?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Continuous iteration and refinement of prompts based on output quality](https://fathom.video/share/sbMExzD8ksniwWaMp1tbwpxTNqnaoTp_?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

### Fundraising Update

  - [GrowthX pushing timeline for Series B](https://fathom.video/share/sbMExzD8ksniwWaMp1tbwpxTNqnaoTp_?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [George involved in various aspects: documents, materials, scheduling meetings](https://fathom.video/share/sbMExzD8ksniwWaMp1tbwpxTNqnaoTp_?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [Fundraising taking priority, causing general busyness in the company](https://fathom.video/share/sbMExzD8ksniwWaMp1tbwpxTNqnaoTp_?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Vivian to break down her AI process into more granular steps and whiteboard the workflow](https://fathom.video/share/sbMExzD8ksniwWaMp1tbwpxTNqnaoTp_?tab=summary&timestamp=1891.0)
  - [Consider enriching vehicle inventory data to improve matching accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/sbMExzD8ksniwWaMp1tbwpxTNqnaoTp_?tab=summary&timestamp=1891.0)
  - [Vivian to potentially meet with Daniel (GrowthX CTO) for expert guidance on AI implementation](https://fathom.video/share/sbMExzD8ksniwWaMp1tbwpxTNqnaoTp_?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
  - [Vivian considering a trip to San Francisco in September to immerse herself in the tech environment and potentially visit GrowthX office](https://fathom.video/share/sbMExzD8ksniwWaMp1tbwpxTNqnaoTp_?tab=summary&timestamp=1837.0)
